LanguageData.FEL_ResearchRequired: Eden: "If you don't research the corresponding technology, I won't let you use it~"
LanguageData.LaserInvalidTarget: "Invalid target, fire control system cannot complete lock-on."
LanguageData.OrbitalStrikeNoOtherMap: "Fire control system has not loaded valid data."
LanguageData.cooldownLeftSeconds: "Irradiation command cooling down, remaining time: {0} seconds."
LanguageData.OrbitalStrikeMessage: "{0} fire control system has loaded trajectory data, locking onto {1} area, commencing irradiation operation."
LanguageData.SelectBeamStartpoint: "Safety disengaged, please designate irradiation starting point coordinates."
LanguageData.SelectBeamEndpoint: "Trigger unlocked, please designate irradiation ending point coordinates."
LanguageData.Holographic.DescNext: "Manually switch to the next holographic image."
LanguageData.ATField_ReflectMode_Desc: Inverts the phase vectors of the AT Field, significantly reducing its rigidity but reflecting incoming projectiles back to their point of origin.
LanguageData.ATField_SuppressExplosions_Desc: In this mode, the AT Field suppresses all high-energy releases within its range. Whether external orbital saturation bombardment or internal thermonuclear mines, both will struggle to cause internal damage.
LanguageData.ATField_RedirectSkyfall_Desc: Projects the AT Field into the upper atmosphere to deflect drop pod landing points, or creates rigid spatial fractures in the atmosphere to directly destroy drop equipment.\n\n（When traffic control is enabled, it indiscriminately deflects all drops including allies and goods. When disabled, only deflects hostile drops.）
LanguageData.ATField_TeleportIntercepted: "Abnormal spatial fluctuations have been denied by AT Field."
LanguageData.ATField_AntiTeleport_Desc: Forcibly suppresses spatial energy within the field using the AT Field, maintaining a low-energy stable state. Directly banishes any targets attempting to warp into the field interior.\n\n（When warp denial is enabled, it indiscriminately intercepts warps. When disabled, only intercepts hostile warps.）
LanguageData.ATField_Break_Warning: "Warning: AT Field oversaturation breach, system shutdown."
LanguageData.CannotFlyThroughWall: "No line of sight along dash path"
LanguageData.Turbojet_CombatMode_Desc: When enabled, turbojet jumps and dashes can use the shield to inflict additional knockback and stun effects.
LanguageData.Turbojet_Mode_Off_Desc: Turbojet engines shut down, generating no thrust.
LanguageData.Turbojet_Mode_HoverMove_Desc:
Turbojet engines idle, maintaining low-altitude flight only during movement. (Cannot directly fly over roofs)
-Can fly over deep water, vacuum, and other terrains
-Not affected by any terrain减速
-Can move under roofs
LanguageData.Turbojet_Mode_HoverAlways_Desc:
Turbojet engines operate at rated capacity, enabling sustained aerial flight. (Cannot directly fly over roofs)
-Ignores walls, can hover over deep water, vacuum, and other terrains
-Not affected by any terrain减速
-Hovering state不受dangerous terrain damage, does not trigger mines
-Cannot move under roofs
